content: The iterative self-feedback loop of Self-Refine can be structured to leverage multiple inconsistent problem-solving perspectives from LLM self-reflection mechanisms, creating a multi-perspective self-refinement framework that avoids the local optima trap that single-perspective self-refinement often falls into. This framework retains Self-Refine's core advantage of requiring no additional training or supervised data while improving output quality by amplifying the critical gaps between conflicting perspectives.
